quiz.question:
White is considering taking on d2 with Nxd2.

Is there something wrong with this capture?

answers.text: No, there’s nothing wrong with Nxd2.

feedback.text: Good job! The knight on f3 is also pinned, so White can get away with this capture.

distractors.text: Yes, you enter a pin and will lose material!

feedback.text: There is a way to escape the pin!

distractors.text: No, but you won’t be able to get out of the pin ever.

feedback.text: Try to pay attention to Black's king position. Is escaping the pin really impossible?
